english: slice (of bread, etc.) / disc / pane (of glass)
notes: Has multiple common meanings: a slice of food, a flat round disc, or a pane of glass (e.g. Fensterscheibe).

sentences.german: Kannst du mir bitte zwei Scheiben Brot schneiden?
sentences.english: Can you please cut me two slices of bread?

sentences.german: Die Scheibe des Autofensters ist gesprungen.
sentences.english: The car window pane has cracked.
